lexis 0.1.0
  • Reference

Filter lexis_wide by norm thresholds

Source: R/lookup.R
lex_filter.Rd

Subset lexis_wide to words that meet all specified threshold conditions. Conditions are evaluated as minimum values (>=) by default; use named list elements with list(min = x, max = y) to specify a range.

lex_filter(..., na.rm = TRUE)

Arguments

...

Named arguments where each name is a dimension column in lexis_wide and each value is either a single numeric (treated as minimum) or a length-2 numeric vector c(min, max).

na.rm

logical. If TRUE (default), words with NA on any filtered dimension are excluded.

Value

A tibble: rows of lexis_wide satisfying all conditions, plus word and lemma columns.

Examples

# high concreteness, high valence
lex_filter(concreteness = 4, valence = 7)
#> # A tibble: 229 × 40
#>    word   lemma    aoa   boi concreteness humor iconicity lancaster_auditory
#>    <chr>  <chr>  <dbl> <dbl>        <dbl> <dbl>     <dbl>              <dbl>
#>  1 money  money   5.11  6.29         4.54  2.25      2.7               0.667
#>  2 girl   girl    4     5.52         4.85  2.65      4.2               3.5  
#>  3 house  house   3.16  5.78         5     2.06      3                 0.438
#>  4 dad    dad     2.58  5.42         4.29  2         4.1               3.17 
#>  5 mother mother  2.63  5.52         4.6   2.19      4.18              3.23 
#>  6 woman  woman   4.95  5.33         4.46  2.54      4.4               4    
#>  7 mom    mom     2.22 NA            4.4   2.22      4.91              4    
#>  8 family family  3.38  5.29         4.23 NA         3.1               3.59 
#>  9 kid    kid     4.28  5.68         4.56  2.78      4.5               3.05 
#> 10 honey  honey   5.44  5.43         4.88  2.53      2.5               0.326
#> # ℹ 219 more rows
#> # ℹ 32 more variables: lancaster_gustatory <dbl>, lancaster_haptic <dbl>,
#> #   lancaster_interoceptive <dbl>, lancaster_olfactory <dbl>,
#> #   lancaster_visual <dbl>, lancaster_foot_leg <dbl>, lancaster_hand_arm <dbl>,
#> #   lancaster_head <dbl>, lancaster_mouth <dbl>, lancaster_torso <dbl>,
#> #   socialness <dbl>, valence <dbl>, arousal <dbl>, dominance <dbl>,
#> #   glasgow_valence <dbl>, glasgow_arousal <dbl>, glasgow_dominance <dbl>, …

# words with aoa between 3 and 8 and low arousal
lex_filter(aoa = c(3, 8), arousal = c(1, 3))
#> # A tibble: 414 × 40
#>    word    lemma     aoa   boi concreteness humor iconicity lancaster_auditory
#>    <chr>   <chr>   <dbl> <dbl>        <dbl> <dbl>     <dbl>              <dbl>
#>  1 let     let      4.53 NA            2.26  2.05      2                 1.35 
#>  2 will    will     7.53  2.37         2.64  2.04      1.8               2.14 
#>  3 way     way      5.39 NA            2.34 NA         3.09              1.38 
#>  4 care    care     5.65 NA            2.33  2.09      3.5               1.63 
#>  5 rest    rest     4.22  2.96         3.03  2.46      4.1               0.611
#>  6 clear   clear    5.8   1.59         3.55  2         4                 2.06 
#>  7 quiet   quiet    4.15  1.96         2.76  2.06      4.45              4.29 
#>  8 careful careful  5.09 NA            1.86 NA         3.4               1.89 
#>  9 table   table    4.39  6.4          4.9   2.42      4.2               0.684
#> 10 relax   relax    7.11 NA            2.86 NA         4                 1.47 
#> # ℹ 404 more rows
#> # ℹ 32 more variables: lancaster_gustatory <dbl>, lancaster_haptic <dbl>,
#> #   lancaster_interoceptive <dbl>, lancaster_olfactory <dbl>,
#> #   lancaster_visual <dbl>, lancaster_foot_leg <dbl>, lancaster_hand_arm <dbl>,
#> #   lancaster_head <dbl>, lancaster_mouth <dbl>, lancaster_torso <dbl>,
#> #   socialness <dbl>, valence <dbl>, arousal <dbl>, dominance <dbl>,
#> #   glasgow_valence <dbl>, glasgow_arousal <dbl>, glasgow_dominance <dbl>, …

# abstract (low concreteness) words with many definitions
lex_filter(concreteness = c(1, 2), n_defs = 5)
#> Warning: Column 'n_defs' not found in lexis_wide — skipping.
#> # A tibble: 8,098 × 40
#>    word    lemma     aoa   boi concreteness humor iconicity lancaster_auditory
#>    <chr>   <chr>   <dbl> <dbl>        <dbl> <dbl>     <dbl>              <dbl>
#>  1 be      be       5.11  1.65         1.85 NA         3                 1.71 
#>  2 know    know     4.5   1.5          1.68  1.89      2.9               1.29 
#>  3 want    want     4.16  1.4          1.93  1.97      3.92              0.812
#>  4 good    good     3.55  2.14         1.64  2.24      4.2               2.53 
#>  5 would   would    5.28  1.44         1.12 NA         2.67              1.29 
#>  6 need    need     3.56 NA            1.69  1.9       4.2               1.95 
#>  7 sorry   sorry    3.44  1.54         1.9  NA         4.64              1.76 
#>  8 sure    sure     4.85 NA            1.73 NA         3.2               1.88 
#>  9 great   great    5.05 NA            1.81  2.49      3.2               1.56 
#> 10 believe believe  5.78 NA            1.55 NA         3                 1.5  
#> # ℹ 8,088 more rows
#> # ℹ 32 more variables: lancaster_gustatory <dbl>, lancaster_haptic <dbl>,
#> #   lancaster_interoceptive <dbl>, lancaster_olfactory <dbl>,
#> #   lancaster_visual <dbl>, lancaster_foot_leg <dbl>, lancaster_hand_arm <dbl>,
#> #   lancaster_head <dbl>, lancaster_mouth <dbl>, lancaster_torso <dbl>,
#> #   socialness <dbl>, valence <dbl>, arousal <dbl>, dominance <dbl>,
#> #   glasgow_valence <dbl>, glasgow_arousal <dbl>, glasgow_dominance <dbl>, …
